title: Hi, I’m Saurabh Parate 👋
text:
Digital Marketing & SEO Specialist with 5+ years of experience in website content management, search optimization, and performance marketing analytics.
I currently work as a Student Digital Marketing Assistant at Cal Poly Pomona, where I manage website content, improve SEO performance, and support data-driven marketing campaigns.

title: About
text:
About Me
I am a digital marketing professional with a background in SEO, paid media, analytics, and website content management.
I am currently pursuing a Master of Science in Digital Marketing and Analytics at California State Polytechnic University, Pomona.
My experience includes: - Website management in CMS platforms - SEO strategy and technical optimization - Paid media campaign support - Performance tracking using GA4, Looker Studio, and Google Tag Manager - Cross-functional collaboration on digital campaigns
My goal is to build digital experiences that improve visibility, user engagement, and measurable business outcomes.

title: Projects
text:
MSDM Capstone Project · Cal Poly Pomona Fall 2025 – Summer 2026

Developing a data-driven framework to measure and justify the ROI of community engagement for Ontario International Airport (ONT).

Client: Ontario International Airport — Community Engagement Team
The Challenge: ONT’s Community Engagement Team is highly active at events, sponsorships, and civic collaborations — but lacked a way to quantify the revenue impact of these efforts.
What I’m doing: - Developing metrics and models linking engagement activities to business outcomes - Identifying leading indicators that predict long-term revenue growth - Exploring cross-industry ROI measurement frameworks - Proposing geotargeting and digital methods to track post-event audience behavior
Methods: Descriptive analytics · Predictive analytics · Surveys & Interviews · SEO · Dashboard Design
Timeline:



Phase
Period
Focus




Phase 1
Fall 2025
Research instruments, data collection


Phase 2
Spring 2026
Data analysis, KPIs, ROI framework


Phase 3
Summer 2026
Public report, final presentation



Skills Gained: - Marketing research & analytics - Data modeling and visualization - Digital marketing attribution (geotargeting, campaign analytics) - Survey/interview design - SEO & web publishing




Major Project · Amity University Aug 2023 – Jan 2024
Explored the role of VR and AR technologies in modern digital marketing strategies, analyzing how immersive experiences impact consumer behavior and brand engagement.




Minor Project · Amity University Feb 2023 – Jun 2023
Investigated how gamification techniques can be applied in digital marketing campaigns to boost user engagement, retention, and conversion rates.

text: Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see https://quarto.org.

text: Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see https://quarto.org.

title: My First Post
text:
Running Code
When you click the Render button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

1 + 1

[1] 2


You can add options to executable code like this


[1] 4


The echo: false option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
